title: rosa pimpinellifolia subvar. lagenoides
intro: Rosa pimpinellifolia subvar. lagenoides, also known as the Burnet rose, is a flowering plant species native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which make it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Rosa pimpinellifolia subvar. lagenoides include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic, making it a valuable natural remedy for various ailments. Rosa pimpinellifolia subvar. lagenoides can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
